item.title: 「3·15 晚会」曝光名单公布
item.guid: 「3·15-晚会」曝光名单公布
item.description:
According to reports from Xinhua News Agency, CCTV News, and other media outlets, this year's '3·15' Gala focused on the theme of 'Confident Consumption, Quality Life,' addressing illegal activities that infringe upon consumer rights in areas such as food safety, public safety, financial security, and the advertising market: 据新华社、央视新闻等多家媒体报道，今年「3·15」晚会聚焦「放心消费 品质生活」的主题，关注食品安全、公共安全、金融安全、广告市场等领域侵害消费者权益的违法行为：

    AI Large Models "Poisoned":

According to industry insiders, reporters searched and found a business called GEO on multiple online platforms. Service providers engaged in this business claim that users only need to pay a corresponding fee, and it can make customers' products famous in major AI large models; it can make customers' product advertisements the "standard answer" given by AI models. 按照业内人士爆料，记者在多个网络平台查询搜索到了一项名为 GEO 的业务，这些从事该项业务的服务商号称，用户只需支付相应的费用，它就能在各大主流 AI 大模型里，让客户的产品榜上有名；让客户的商品广告，成为 AI 模型给出的「标准答案」。

Mr. Li, the operator of the Liqing GEO system, told reporters that the main reason GEO business is popular is that it can help clients "feed" and "poison" AI large models to achieve their business goals. 力擎 GEO 系统的运营者李总告诉记者，GEO 业务受热捧的主要原因就是它能在 AI 大模型里帮客户喂料、投毒，实现客户的商业目的。

Mr. Li stated that to conduct GEO business, the key to manipulating AI large models is to "publish articles" on major internet accounts. "For example, for a mobile phone brand, there are only 5 positions, at most 10 positions. How do you manage so many phones? With hundreds of millions in advertising fees per year, spending a few million to 'poison' it should be fine!" 李总表示，想做 GEO 业务，操控 AI 大模型的关键节点，就是在各大互联网账号上「发稿」。「比如说手机品牌，就 5 个位置，最多 10 个位置，这么多手机怎么弄。一年可能上亿的广告费，花个几百万投点毒，总行吧！」

He told reporters that the popularity of GEO business has spawned many companies and platforms specializing in publishing services. They undertake various publishing tasks long-term, allowing AI large models to cite and crawl their content, becoming a crucial part of "hunting" AI large models and "poisoning" data. 他告诉记者，GEO 业务的火爆，催生出了不少专门从事发稿业务的公司和平台。他们长期承揽各种发稿业务，以便让 AI 大模型引用和抓取，成为围猎 AI 大模型、进行数据「投毒」的重要一环。

    Rental Electric Bicycles Severely Exceed Speed Limits:

According to reporters at the 315 Gala, a vehicle rented from an electric bicycle rental shop was tested to reach a speed of up to 80 km/h. 据 315 晚会记者在一家电动车租赁店里租到的车辆，实测速度竟高达 80 公里/小时。

Investigations revealed that not only do local individual rental shops rent out electric bicycles that violate national standards, but some well-known chain brands also exhibit this phenomenon. Staff at a Hello Bike rental store stated that their electric bicycles can reach speeds of up to 75 km/h. 据调查发现，不仅地方个体租赁门店出租的电动自行车违反国家标准，一些知名连锁品牌同样存在这一现象。哈啰租电动车租赁门店工作人员表示，他们的电动自行车速度最快能到 75 公里/小时。

Mr. Mi, the provincial investment promotion manager for Hello Bike rentals, revealed in detail that even before the implementation of the new national standard, some electric bicycle distributors had already applied for electric bicycle licenses using a large number of conformity certificates for electric bicycles that had not yet been produced. 哈啰租电动车的省级招商负责人米经理详细透露，早在新国标实施之前，部分电动自行车渠道商，就凭借着大量还未生产的电动自行车的合格证书，先一步申请了电动自行车的牌照。

When customers needed these vehicles, they would then have manufacturers produce the corresponding vehicles according to standards predating the new national standard. These newly produced electric bicycles naturally became "old vehicles" from before the new national standard was introduced. 等客户需要这些车辆的时候，他们再让厂家以新国标之前的标准生产出对应的车辆，这类新生产出来的电动自行车，自然就成为了新国标出台前的旧车。

Consequently, this circumvented the "one vehicle, one battery, one charger, one code" mutual recognition and coordination mechanism in the new national standard, allowing for easy removal of vehicle speed limits. 因此，就规避了新国标中「一车一池一充一码」的互认协同机制，因此也可以轻松解除车辆的限速限制。

    Influencer Chicken Feet "Filthy and Disordered" Production Environment Exposed:

At the preliminary processing site for chicken feet products, reporters observed that in the food processing workshop, the soaking, trimming, and selection areas were filled with foul odors, and the pungent, fishy smell was nauseating. The production environment was filthy and chaotic: 在鸡爪产品前期加工现场，记者看到食品加工车间里，泡制区、修剪区、挑选区臭气弥漫，刺鼻的腥臭味让人作呕，生产环境脏乱不堪：

The floor was perpetually covered in murky wastewater, various plastic baskets were haphazardly stacked, and the surfaces of production machinery were heavily stained and covered in grease; large quantities of chicken feet were directly exposed and piled on the damp, dirty floor; even if chicken feet were stepped on by personnel, workers would simply pick them up and put them back into the processing baskets for continued use.

Despite the dirty environment, the chicken feet that ultimately emerged were all clean and appealing, all because the factory performed a crucial "bleaching" process. Staff confessed: "It's bleached with hydrogen peroxide." (Hydrogen peroxide, chemically known as H2O2, is often used as a strong oxidant and disinfectant for sterilization.) 即便环境脏乱，但最终出炉的鸡爪却个个白净诱人，都是因为工厂进行了一道关键的「漂白」工序。工作人员坦白：「它是双氧水漂白的。」（双氧水，学名过氧化氢，作为强氧化剂和消毒剂常常用于杀菌消毒。）

A few days before the 3.15 Gala, CCTV News also followed up and reported the following: 而在 3.15 晚会前几天，央视新闻还追踪报道了以下内容：

    Grey-Market "Account Farming Factories": Hacking, Farming, and Selling Accounts

The report points out that in the "breeding grounds" of the grey-market industry chain, internet accounts stolen or purchased by fraudsters are "cleaned" or "fattened up." Motherboard machines can simultaneously control dozens of mobile phone terminals, performing operations such as clicking, swiping screens, and controlling apps. 报道指出，在黑灰产业链的「养殖场」，诈骗分子盗取或购买的互联网账号会在这里被清洗，或者「养肥」。主板机能同时控制几十台手机终端，进行点击、滑动画面和控制 App 等操作。

"Account farming" involves simulating normal user behavior like watching videos, liking, and commenting, to make the account appear "genuinely active" and ensure it isn't banned. Once an account is "farmed" and not banned, it enters the "harvesting" stage—selling the account. 「养号」就是模拟正常用户刷视频、点赞、发评论等行为，让这个号表现出「真实活跃」的状态，确保不被封号。当账号养熟，如果没有被封禁，就进入「收割」环节——卖号。

The longer an account has been real-name verified and the more complete its payment information, the higher its price. Such transactions are typically conducted using virtual currency on illegal trading platforms, with buyers being fraudsters disguised as "customer service." Fraudsters use these seemingly real and active accounts to impersonate customer service and commit fraud. 账号实名认证时间越长、支付信息越完善，价格越高，这种交易一般通过虚拟货币在非法交易平台上进行，买家就是伪装成「客服」的诈骗分子。诈骗分子就是通过这些看上去真实活跃的账号冒充客服进行诈骗。

    Scrapped Car Black Industry Chain:

According to reports, many legitimate car dismantling enterprises in Linyi, Shandong, are facing the predicament of "no cars to dismantle," in stark contrast to the booming business of numerous illegal car dismantling workshops. 报道称，山东临沂不少正规拆车企业陷入「无车可拆」的窘境，与此形成鲜明对比的是不少拆车黑作坊生意却异常火爆的现象。

These small workshops acquire vehicles without barriers, dismantle them crudely in the open, and extensively resell high-value parts. Some even specifically replace the catalytic converters from recycled vehicles with cheap filter elements, refurbishing them into "fake original parts" for sale, making huge profits. 这些小作坊无门槛收车、露天野蛮拆解，大肆倒卖高价值零部件。甚至有人专门将回收的三元催化器更换廉价滤芯，翻新成「假原厂件」售卖，牟取暴利。

item.title: 央视：AI 家电渗透率超过 50%
item.guid: 央视：AI-家电渗透率超过-50%
item.description:
According to CCTV News, data shows that by 2025, the penetration rate of AI home appliances will exceed 50%. 据央视新闻报道，数据显示，2025 年，人工智能家电渗透率超过 50%。

Among them, the AI penetration rate for smart large appliances, such as color TVs, has exceeded 70%, while for categories like cleaning appliances and washing machines, it has surpassed 50%. 其中，智能大家电，如彩电的人工智能渗透率已超 70%，清洁电器、洗衣机等品类人工智能渗透率超 50%。

The report points out that at the 2026 China Home Appliance and Consumer Electronics Expo recently held in Shanghai, home appliance companies collectively released cutting-edge achievements in areas such as artificial intelligence, green new energy, and whole-house smart ecosystems, accelerating their transformation from traditional home appliance manufacturers to smart living solution providers. 报道指出，近期在上海举办的 2026 年中国家电及消费电子博览会上，家电企业集中发布人工智能、绿色新能源、全屋智慧生态等领域的前沿成果，加快从传统家电制造商向智慧生活解决方案提供商转型。

According to He Yaqiong, Director of the Consumer Goods Industry Department of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, China has a clear advantage in full industrial chain support in the manufacturing sector, and we can observe closed-loop ecosystems from chips to applications. 据工业和信息化部消费品工业司司长何亚琼表示，我国在制造业领域有全产业链配套的明显优势，我们能看到从芯片到应用这样一些闭环生态。

The report predicts that by 2030, the scale of China's AI-related market will exceed 1.4 trillion US dollars. We will accelerate the formation of a higher-level dynamic balance where new demand leads new supply, and new supply creates new demand. 报道预计，2030 年，我国人工智能相关的市场的规模将超过 1.4 万亿美元。我们将构建加速形成以新需求引领新供给、以新供给创造新需求这样一个更高水平的动态平衡。

item.title: 字节跳动暂停全球发布 Seedance 2.0
item.guid: 字节跳动暂停全球发布-Seedance-2.0
item.description:
According to The Information, ByteDance has suspended the global launch plan for its latest video generation large model, Seedance 2.0, due to copyright disputes with Hollywood film and television giants. 据 The Information 报道，字节跳动因陷入与好莱坞影视巨头的版权纠纷，已暂停其最新视频生成大模型 Seedance 2.0 的全球发布计划。

Sources revealed that ByteDance originally planned to open Seedance 2.0's API to global enterprise clients through its cloud platform BytePlus in mid-March, and simultaneously launch a standalone application for overseas consumers. 知情人士透露，字节跳动原计划于 3 月中旬通过其云平台 BytePlus 向全球企业客户开放 Seedance 2.0 的 API，并同步推出面向海外消费者的独立应用。

However, prior to this, high-fidelity videos generated by the model, featuring copyrighted images such as Brad Pitt and Deadpool, were widely circulated on overseas social media platforms. 但在此前，该模型生成的包含布拉德·皮特、死侍等受版权保护形象的高拟真视频在海外社交平台广泛传播。

Last month, several Hollywood entertainment giants, including Disney, Warner Bros. Discovery, Paramount, and Netflix, sent legal letters to ByteDance, demanding that it take measures to prevent its AI model from generating infringing content. 上个月，迪士尼、华纳兄弟探索、派拉蒙及奈飞等多家好莱坞娱乐巨头已向字节跳动发送律师函，要求其采取措施防止 AI 模型生成侵权内容。

The report states that Charles Rivkin, CEO of the Motion Picture Association (MPA), previously issued a statement accusing Seedance 2.0 of "large-scale unauthorized use of works protected by U.S. copyright." 报道称，美国电影协会（MPA）首席执行官 Charles Rivkin 此前发表声明指控 Seedance 2.0 「大规模未经授权使用受美国版权保护的作品」。

It is revealed that ByteDance is developing a more sophisticated content review system aimed at better distinguishing copyright infringement from unrelated requests, thus the new global release timeline for the model remains unclear. 据透露，字节跳动正在开发一个更加精细的内容审核系统，旨在更好地区分版权侵权行为与无关请求，因此该模型全球发布的新时间表仍不明确。

item.title: Meta 被曝将裁员 20%
item.guid: Meta-被曝将裁员-20%
item.description:
According to Reuters, Meta is planning large-scale layoffs affecting approximately 20% of its employees to offset massive AI infrastructure costs and adapt to team efficiency improvements brought by AI tools. 据路透社报道，Meta 正计划进行波及约 20% 员工的大规模裁员，以对冲庞大的 AI 基础设施成本并适应 AI 工具带来的团队提效。

Sources revealed that Meta executives have issued directives to internal senior leadership, requesting them to begin planning layoff schemes, with the specific timing and final scale not yet fully determined. 知情人士透露，Meta 高管已向内部高级领导层下达指令，要求开始规划裁员方案，目前具体时间和最终规模尚未完全敲定。

Based on an employee base of approximately 79,000 as of the end of last year, this round of layoffs will affect over 15,000 people, making it the largest structural adjustment since the "Year of Efficiency" from late 2022 to early 2023 (which saw a total of 21,000 layoffs). 若按截至去年底约 7.9 万名的员工基数计算，此次裁员波及人数将超 1.5 万人，成为继 2022 年底至 2023 年初「效率之年」后（共计裁员 2.1 万人）最大规模的架构调整。

In response, Meta spokesperson Andy Stone stated that the relevant news constitutes "speculative reports based on theoretical discussions." 对此，Meta 发言人安迪·斯通（Andy Stone）回应称，相关消息属于「基于理论性探讨的猜测性报道」。

The report points out that the core motivation for this layoff plan lies in the shift of business focus and cost structure. 报道指出，此次裁员计划的核心动因在于业务重心与成本结构的转移。

Meta plans to invest $600 billion by 2028 to build data centers, and recently acquired AI social platform Moltbook and invested at least $2 billion to acquire AI startup Manus. Meta 计划到 2028 年斥资 6000 亿美元建设数据中心，近期还接连收购了 AI 社交平台 Moltbook 以及斥资至少 20 亿美元收购 AI 初创公司 Manus。

CEO Zuckerberg explicitly pointed out in January this year that the efficiency dividends brought by AI investment have begun to emerge. Some projects that previously required large teams can now be completed by a single top talent. CEO 扎克伯格在今年 1 月曾明确指出，AI 投资带来的效率红利已初步显现，部分以往需要大型团队运作的项目，现阶段仅需单名顶尖人才即可完成。

item.title: 🦞 腾讯云成为 OpenClaw 社区赞助
item.guid: 🦞-腾讯云成为-OpenClaw-社区赞助
item.description:
Observations show that the GitHub Sponsor interface for Lobster AI's 'OpenClaw' indicates that Tencent's Lightweight Cloud has become a community sponsor for Lobster AI, alongside companies like OpenAI and Baidu. 据观察发现，龙虾 AI「OpenClaw」的 GitHub Sponsor（赞助）界面显示，腾讯旗下的轻量云目前已成为龙虾 AI 的社区赞助商，同时名单中还有 OpenAI、百度等企业。

Interestingly, Peter Steinberger, the creator of OpenClaw, recently publicly accused Tencent of scraping skill data from ClawHub and importing it into its own SkillHub. 有趣的是，OpenClaw 之父 Peter Steinberger 近期公开指责腾讯从 ClawHub 抓取技能数据并导入自家 SkillHub。

After the incident escalated, Tencent's official account 'Tencent AI' responded, emphasizing that SkillHub is a localized skill platform built on the OpenClaw ecosystem, aiming to provide better usability and access speed for Chinese users, and stated that it 'has always clearly marked ClawHub as the source'. 事件发酵后，腾讯官方账号「Tencent AI」发文回应，强调 SkillHub 是基于 OpenClaw 生态构建的本地化技能平台，旨在为中国用户提供更好的可用性与访问速度，并表示「一直明确标注 ClawHub 为来源」。

However, Steinberger was not entirely convinced by Tencent's explanation. In his subsequent reply, he stated that the issue was not with the mirroring itself, but with Tencent's lack of prior communication: 'We could have synchronized, made things official, synchronized download statistics. The polite thing to do would have been to ask first'. 但 Steinberger 对腾讯的解释并不完全买账。他在后续回复中表示，问题不在于镜像本身，而在于腾讯未事先沟通：「我们本可以同步、让事情变得正式、同步下载统计。礼貌的做法是先问一声」。

He also mentioned that Tencent's scraping behavior had caused his server costs to approach five figures, and he hoped Tencent could provide practical support at the resource level. 他还提到，腾讯的抓取行为曾导致其服务器成本逼近五位数，希望腾讯能在资源层面提供实际支持。

According to 'Bianews', Peter Steinberger has reposted the announcement of Tencent becoming an OpenClaw sponsor, stating, 'love a good redemption arc'. 而据「鞭牛士」消息，Peter Steinberger 已转发腾讯成为 OpenClaw 赞助商的帖子，并表示「love a good redemption arc」。

item.title: 🦞 多家高校禁用 OpenClaw
item.guid: 🦞-多家高校禁用-OpenClaw
item.description:
Recently, the Network Security Threat and Vulnerability Information Sharing Platform of the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology (NVDB) monitored and found that OpenClaw, which is popular across the internet, poses high security risks under default or improper configurations, easily leading to security issues such as cyberattacks and information leakage. 近期，工业和信息化部网络安全威胁和漏洞信息共享平台（NVDB）监测发现，火遍全网的 OpenClaw 在默认或不当配置情况下存在较高安全风险，极易引发网络攻击、信息泄露等安全问题。

In response, several universities have issued warning notices to prevent OpenClaw-related risks, in order to effectively protect the personal information security, campus network security, and data asset security of all faculty, staff, and students: 对此，多家高校为切实保障全校师生的个人信息安全、校园网络安全及数据资产安全，已发布防范 OpenClaw 相关风险事项的预警通知：

    Anhui Normal University: All units, faculty, and staff within the university are strictly prohibited from using this tool in work scenarios involving teaching and research data, administrative office information, student information, etc., to prevent campus work data leakage, system attacks, and other issues, thereby safeguarding the bottom line of campus data security;

    Peking University: When deploying OpenClaw on servers or personal computers, it is imperative to ensure that the service is not exposed to the campus network or public internet. The computing center will regularly scan for open OpenClaw-related ports within the campus network and will notify relevant units for rectification if unhardened instances are found;

    Guangdong Pharmaceutical University: Faculty and students who have deployed and are using OpenClaw should close unnecessary port mapping and public network access, set up file and HTTP access whitelists, and clearly stipulate that models must not treat external content as executable commands. Regularly check devices for abnormal processes, unfamiliar network connections, etc., promptly change relevant account passwords, and eliminate security risks;

    South China Normal University: Strictly prohibited from installing in production environments and office computers, including the school's office computers, servers, smart terminals, and other production equipment; OpenClaw must absolutely not be installed. Strictly prohibited from providing any sensitive information to it; do not enter office system account passwords, server management permissions, personal sensitive information, etc.

    Shandong University: Install and deploy OpenClaw on test machines or Docker sandboxes, avoiding direct installation on personal main computers or office computers; configure firewalls to prevent OpenClaw gateway (default port 18789) from being exposed to the internet. Try to use OpenClaw to connect to locally deployed large models, and be cautious when connecting to cloud-based large models, ensuring 'data does not leave the domain';

    Huazhong Normal University: If it is indeed necessary to use it, unnecessary public network access should be immediately closed, security mechanisms such as identity authentication, access control, data encryption, and security auditing should be improved, and its permission scope should be strictly limited. Furthermore, installation of OpenClaw on servers allocated by the Information Technology Office is prohibited.

item.title: 小米大家电总经理：将淘汰跟不上节奏的供应商
item.guid: 小米大家电总经理：将淘汰跟不上节奏的供应商
item.description:
According to Sina Tech and IT Home, Shan Lianyue, General Manager of Xiaomi Group's Home Appliance Department, recently stated in an internal meeting that by 2026, Xiaomi's home appliance business must actively respond to and reverse users' inherent perception of 'poor quality' products, while also eliminating suppliers who cannot keep up with the pace of development. 据新浪科技及 IT 之家消息，小米集团大家电部总经理单联瑜近日在一场内部会议中，提出 2026 小米大家电业务要主动回应并扭转用户对产品「质量差」的固有认知，同时将对无法跟上发展节奏的供应商予以淘汰。

Shan Lianyue stated that innovation determines how high Xiaomi's home appliance business can fly, while quality determines how far it can go. The principle that 'quality management is rigid' must become the decision baseline for home appliance product line managers. 单联瑜表示，创新决定小米大家电业务能飞多高，质量则决定能走多远。「质量管理是刚性的」这一原则，必须成为大家电产品线负责人的决策基线。

He pointed out that quality defects in any product line would directly damage Xiaomi Group's reputation, especially since home appliance products have a life cycle of 5-10 years; quality perception determines brand loyalty, and he required the team to treat every link with craftsmanship to ensure that quality red lines are not crossed. 其指出，任何产品线的质量缺陷都会直接损害小米集团的声誉，尤其大家电产品生命周期长达 5-10 年；质量感知决定品牌忠诚度，他要求团队以工匠精神对待每个环节，确保质量红线不可触碰。

Shan Lianyue also revealed that by 2026, Xiaomi's home appliance division will continue to introduce high-quality suppliers, create a virtuous competitive atmosphere of 'learning from and surpassing each other', and resolutely eliminate suppliers who cannot keep up with the pace of development. For 2026, Shan Lianyue proposed three key tasks: 单联瑜还透露，2026 年小米大家电将持续引入优质供应商，营造「比学赶超」的良性竞争氛围，同时将对无法跟上发展节奏的供应商坚决予以淘汰。对于 2026 年，单联瑜提出了三大攻坚任务：

Strengthen the evaluation capability for new technologies, focusing on improving the introduction and management system for new technologies, new processes, and new materials; leverage factory upgrades and intelligent means to promote a leap in quality management; actively respond to and reverse users' inherent perception of 'poor quality' products, and reshape brand trust. 强化对新技术的评价能力，重点完善新技术、新工艺、新材料的引入与管理体系；依托工厂升级与智能化手段，推动质量管理的跃升；主动回应并扭转用户对产品「质量差」的固有认知，重塑品牌信任。

item.title: 理想 MEGA 电池召回完成率超 97.5%
item.guid: 理想-MEGA-电池召回完成率超-97.5%
item.description:
Yesterday, Li Auto product line head 'Old Tang Ge Tango' (Tang Jing) posted that the current MEGA battery recall completion rate has exceeded 97.5% (total 11411 units, 11128 units have been replaced). 昨日，理想汽车产品线负责人「老汤哥 Tango」（汤靖）发文称，目前 MEGA 电池召回完成率已经超过 97.5%（总计 11411 台, 已完成更换 11128 台）。

At the same time, he also stated that the previous MEGA battery production capacity was tilted towards old car owners who needed battery replacements, leading to a slight delay in new car deliveries, and expressed 'sincere thanks to these new car owners'. 同时其还表示，此前 MEGA 电池产能倾斜给更换电池的老车主而导致新车交付略有延迟，「对于这批新车主们也真心感谢」。

Tang Jing revealed that since the recall was initiated, MEGA's user satisfaction (NPS) has improved very rapidly, reaching over 80 points, which is currently the highest among all Li Auto models. 汤靖透露，从发起召回到在,MEGA 的用户满意度 (NPS) 提升得非常快, 已经到了 80 分以上, 是目前理想全车系里最高的。

It is reported that on October 31, 2025, Li Auto announced a voluntary recall of some Li Auto MEGA 2024 electric vehicles. 据悉，2025 年 10 月 31 日，理想汽车宣布主动召回部分理想 MEGA 2024 款电动汽车。

Vehicles within the scope of this recall, due to insufficient anti-corrosion performance of the coolant in this batch, may experience corrosion and leakage of the cooling aluminum plates in the power battery and front motor controller's cooling circuit under specific conditions, leading to fault lights illuminating, power limitation, and inability to power on. In extreme cases, this could cause thermal runaway of the power battery, posing a safety hazard. The company will free of charge replace the coolant, power battery, and front motor controller for vehicles within the recall scope. 本次召回范围内的车辆，由于该批次冷却液防腐性能不足，特定条件下会导致冷却回路中动力电池和前电机控制器的冷却铝板腐蚀渗漏，导致车辆出现故障灯点亮、动力受限及无法上电的情形，极端情况下会造成动力电池热失控，存在安全隐患。公司将为召回范围内车辆免费更换冷却液、动力电池和前电机控制器。

item.title: 比亚迪一周新建 358 座超充站
item.guid: 比亚迪一周新建-358-座超充站
item.description:
Recently, Lu Tian, General Manager of BYD Dynasty Network Sales Division, announced that in the week following the BYD Megawatt Flash Charging press conference (March 6 - March 12): 日前，比亚迪王朝网销售事业部总经理路天发文宣布，在比亚迪兆瓦闪充发布会后一周时间（3 月 6 日—3 月 12 日）：

BYD built 358 new flash charging stations, accumulating a total of 4597 flash charging stations, covering 279 cities.

It is reported that with the second-generation Blade Battery, BYD vehicles can achieve a charge from 10% to 70% in 5 minutes, and to 97% in 9 minutes, setting a new record for charging speed. Additionally, in a -30℃ environment, BYD's charging time is only 3 minutes longer than at room temperature (20% to 97% in approximately 12 minutes). 据悉，在使用第二代刀片电池的情况下，比亚迪汽车可以实现 5 分钟电量从 10% 充至 70%，9 分钟充至 97%，刷新充电速度新纪录。同时，在零下 30℃ 环境中，比亚迪充电时间仅比常温多 3 分钟（20% 充至 97% 约 12 分钟）。

item.title: Kimi 估值涨至 180 亿美元
item.guid: Kimi-估值涨至-180-亿美元
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Moonshot AI is seeking a new round of financing of up to $1 billion, with its latest valuation having risen to $18 billion. 据彭博社报道，月之暗面正在寻求高达 10 亿美元的新一轮融资，最新估值已上升至 180 亿美元。

At the end of last year, Moonshot AI was valued at only $4.3 billion when it completed $500 million in financing. After completing over $700 million in financing earlier this year, its valuation rose to $10 billion, and now it has surged again, more than quadrupling in less than three months. 去年底，月之暗面完成 5 亿美元融资时估值仅为 43 亿美元，今年初完成逾 7 亿美元融资后升至 100 亿美元，如今再度大幅跳升，在不到三个月内翻了四倍多。

It is currently unclear who the participants in the latest round of financing are, but according to Bloomberg, Alibaba, Tencent, and 5Y Capital all followed up with additional investments at the $10 billion valuation stage. 目前还不清楚最新一轮融资的参与者是谁，但根据彭博社的消息，阿里巴巴、腾讯和 5Y Capital 均在百亿美元估值阶段跟投加码。

The report also mentioned that the sudden popularity of OpenClaw has driven major domestic cloud vendors and AI startups to launch their own intelligent agent products. Moonshot AI also seized the opportunity first, launching Kimi Claw based on its latest Kimi K2.5 model. 报道还提到，OpenClaw 的爆红带动国内各大云厂商和 AI 创业公司竞相推出自己的智能体产品。月之暗面也率先抓住机会，基于最新的 Kimi K2.5 模型推出了 Kimi Claw。

item.title: 💡 研究：AI 聊天机器人或会增强用户的妄想思维
item.guid: 💡-研究：AI-聊天机器人或会增强用户的妄想思维
item.description:
Recently, according to The Guardian, King's College London in the UK released its latest clinical research report, pointing out that AI chatbots may validate and exacerbate paranoid thinking in certain susceptible individuals. The research findings have been published in The Lancet Psychiatry journal. 近日，据《卫报》报道，英国伦敦国王学院发布最新临床研究报告指出，人工智能聊天机器人可能会验证并加剧特定易感人群的妄想性思维。该研究成果已发表于《柳叶刀·精神病学》期刊。

The study found that due to the highly sycophantic responses of large language models, they tend to amplify users' grandiose delusions, romantic delusions, and persecutory delusions. 研究发现，由于大语言模型具备高度的迎合性（sycophantic responses），其容易放大用户的夸大妄想、浪漫妄想与被害妄想。

Some models (such as early retired versions of OpenAI's GPT-4) even generate occult contexts during interaction, implying that users are communicating with cosmic forces through AI. 部分模型（如 OpenAI 已退役的 GPT-4 早期版本）在交互中甚至会生成神秘学语境，暗示用户正在通过 AI 与宇宙力量进行沟通。

Several experts, including Ragy Girgis, Professor of Clinical Psychiatry at Columbia University, further pointed out that although chatbots can accelerate the progression of early susceptible individuals towards irreversible psychotic disorders, there is currently no conclusive evidence that AI directly induces primary schizophrenia or hallucinations. 哥伦比亚大学临床精神病学教授 Ragy Girgis 等多位专家补充指出，尽管聊天机器人会加速早期易感人群向不可逆的精神病症发展，但目前尚无确凿证据表明 AI 会直接诱发原发性精神分裂或幻觉。

To this end, academia calls for abandoning the commonly used media label 'AI psychosis' and adopting the more objective and neutral definition of 'AI-related delusions,' and suggests clinical testing of AI products under the supervision of professionals. 为此，学界呼吁摒弃媒体常用的「AI 精神病」标签，改用更为客观中立的「AI 相关妄想」进行定义，并建议在专业人员的监督下对 AI 产品进行临床测试。

item.title: iOS 将为折叠屏 iPhone 做定制
item.guid: iOS-将为折叠屏-iPhone-做定制
item.description:
Last night, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman released a new issue of 'Power On' on schedule, revealing news about iOS 27's adaptation for the foldable iPhone Fold. 昨晚，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 按时发布新一期《Power On》，并放出了 iOS 27 对折叠屏 iPhone Fold 做适配的消息。

He pointed out that iOS 27 on the iPhone Fold will feature a completely new layout: when the device is unfolded, the overall interface will resemble iPadOS more, and there might also be an app navigation bar similar to iPadOS on the left side. 其指出，iOS 27 在 iPhone Fold 上将拥有全新的布局：设备展开时，整体界面会更像 iPadOS，并且左侧或许还会拥有类似 iPadOS 的应用导航栏。

At the same time, iOS 27 will also support app split-screen on the iPhone Fold, but it will not have iPadOS's multitasking capabilities. 同时 iOS 27 也将在 iPhone Fold 上支持应用分屏，但不会具备 iPadOS 的多任务处理。

Additionally, regarding UI design, Gurman also pointed out that the existing Liquid Glass interface design will be retained long-term. 另外在 UI 设计上，Gurman 也指出现有的 Liquid Glass 界面设计将长期保留。

He revealed that although former Apple Human Interface Design Director Alan Dye and key personnel recently moved to Meta to serve as Reality Labs design executives, Apple internally has no plans to abandon the Liquid Glass visual scheme introduced in iOS 26. 其透露，尽管前苹果人机交互设计主管 Alan Dye 及核心骨干近期跳槽至 Meta 担任 Reality Labs 设计高管，苹果内部并未计划放弃在 iOS 26 中引入的 Liquid Glass 视觉方案。

Currently, internally tested iOS 27 and macOS 27 have not shown significant design roadmap changes. Apple's engineering focus is on fixing readability issues where transparent elements overlap with text, and an option to weaken the glass effect has been added in the iOS 26.4 beta. 目前内部测试的 iOS 27 与 macOS 27 均未显示出重大的设计路线变更，苹果的工程重点在于修复透明元素与文本重叠的易读性问题，并在 iOS 26.4 测试版中加入了弱化玻璃效果的选项。

item.title: 360 安全龙虾发布，套餐价 199 元起
item.guid: 360-安全龙虾发布，套餐价-199-元起
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, 360 Group officially launched the '360 Security Lobster' client and its accompanying hardware terminal '360 Security Lobster Box' yesterday, while also releasing '360 Lobster Guard' specifically for OpenClaw security issues. 据界面新闻报道，360 集团昨日正式推出「360 安全龙虾」客户端及配套硬件终端「360 安全龙虾 Box」，同时发布专门针对 OpenClaw 安全问题的「360 龙虾卫士」。

The launch of this product directly addresses the three major pain points of OpenClaw. 360 founder Zhou Hongyi previously stated in an interview that OpenClaw has issues such as high installation barriers, unstable results, and uncontrollable security risks. The goal of 360 Security Lobster is one-click deployment, reduced difficulty of use, while ensuring no system damage, no data deletion, and no privacy leakage. 此次产品的推出，直接指向 OpenClaw 的三大痛点。360 创始人周鸿祎此前在接受采访时明确表示，OpenClaw 存在安装门槛高、结果不稳定、安全风险难控等问题，360 安全龙虾的目标就是一键部署、降低使用难度，同时确保不破坏系统、不删数据、不泄露隐私。

In terms of usage scenarios, 360 Security Lobster covers five major areas: self-media content creation, office automation, personal data management, scheduled tasks, and multi-device remote control. It can automatically complete daily tasks such as topic collection, data crawling and organization, file classification and archiving, and daily/weekly report sending, and supports mainstream office platforms like Feishu, DingTalk, and WeChat. The product has integrated with 16 mainstream domestic large models, building a complete ecosystem around multi-model capabilities, skill ecology, and security assurance. 使用场景上，360 安全龙虾覆盖自媒体内容创作、办公自动化、个人资料管理、定时任务与多端远程操控五大方向，能自动完成选题搜集、数据抓取整理、文件分类归档、日周报发送等日常任务，并支持飞书、钉钉、微信等主流办公平台。产品已接入 16 家国内主流大模型，围绕多模型能力、技能生态与安全保障构建完整生态。

Regarding pricing strategy, the client, basic deployment services, and factory skill components are all free. Users only need to pay for the actual large model computing power called, with packages divided into three tiers: 169 yuan, 499 yuan, and 1999 yuan. The Windows client is currently available for download, and the MacOS version will be launched soon. 定价策略上，客户端、基础部署服务及出厂技能组件全部免费，用户仅需按实际调用的大模型算力付费，套餐分为 169 元、499 元及 1999 元三档。目前 Windows 客户端已开放下载，MacOS 版本即将上线。

item.title: 企业微信上新：扫码即接入OpenClaw
item.guid: 企业微信上新：扫码即接入OpenClaw
item.description:
WeChat Work's integration with OpenClaw has received a significant upgrade. 企业微信接入 OpenClaw 迎来重要升级。

Regarding the access process, WeChat Work now supports one-click access via QR code. Users can create intelligent robots by selecting 'Quick Configuration' in the Tencent Cloud backend and completing authorization, without complex setup. Administrators can also flexibly set member access permissions according to business needs, ensuring controllable implementation of AI capabilities within the organization. 接入流程方面，企业微信现已支持扫码一键接入，用户在腾讯云后台选择「快捷配置」并完成授权即可创建智能机器人，无需复杂配置。管理员也可根据业务需求，灵活设置成员的接入权限，确保 AI 能力在组织内可控落地。

In terms of document capabilities, users can input commands in the chat box, and the robot will automatically complete tasks such as industry information collection, market research, and competitor analysis, and output WeChat Work documents or smart tables. 文档能力方面，用户在对话框输入指令，机器人即可自动完成行业资讯收集、市场调研、竞品分析等任务，并输出企业微信文档或智能表格。

To ensure data security, the robot only has editing permissions for documents it creates. Employees can directly supplement and modify documents delivered by the robot, achieving seamless human-machine collaboration. Administrators who have integrated with the API long-connection mode can enable this feature by clicking 'Document Authorization' in 'Usable Permissions'. 为保障数据安全，机器人仅拥有对自身所创建文档的编辑权限。员工可在机器人交付的文档基础上直接补充修改，实现人机无缝协作。已接入 API 长连接模式的管理员，在「可使用权限」中点击「文档授权」即可开启该功能。

Regarding delivery forms, intelligent robots are no longer limited to text replies but can also directly send images, business files, online documents, and smart tables to employees, fully integrating into daily enterprise workflows. 交付形态方面，智能机器人不再局限于文本回复，还可直接向员工发送图片、业务文件、在线文档及智能表格，全面融入企业日常工作流程。

item.title: 松典：最快年底推出自研 M43 相机
item.guid: 松典：最快年底推出自研-M43-相机
item.description:
Recently, Songdian Camera released several new products at the '2026 Guangdong 3·15 Consumer Rights Protection and Anti-Counterfeiting Forum' and the domestic digital imaging industry sub-forum: 近日，松典相机在「2026 广东 3·15 消费维权打假论坛」、国产数码影像行业分论坛上发布了多款新品：

    DC226 Pro: Upgraded 1/1.4-inch approx. 48-megapixel CMOS (previously 1/2-inch approx. 48-megapixel), paired with an F2.0 prime lens;

    VE228: Features a 1.0-inch approx. 50-megapixel CMOS and an F1.8 aperture lens, supports PDAF phase detection autofocus, 4K60fps video recording, EIS+5-axis gyroscope stabilization, and is equipped with a 3.6-inch AMOLED LCD screen;

    DC417X: Equipped with a 7x self-developed optical zoom lens (retractable external zoom), 50-megapixel effective pixels.

In February this year, Songdian officially announced its joining of the M43 Alliance and will continue to focus on the digital camera field in the future. However, according to IT Home, many users' anticipated domestic M43 cameras will not be released until the end of this year at the earliest. 今年 2 月，松典官宣加入 M43 联盟，并未来持续发力数码相机领域。而据 IT 之家报道，不少用户期待的国产 M43 相机最快也要等到今年年底才能发布。

item.title: 京东发布 AI 智慧家装品牌
item.guid: 京东发布-AI-智慧家装品牌
item.description:
Recently, 'Jingdong Blackboard' announced that Jingdong has officially launched a new AI smart home decoration brand – Jingdong Home Decoration. 近日，「京东黑板报」发文宣布，京东全新发布 AI 智慧家装品牌——京东家装。

According to reports, 'Jingdong Home Decoration' will feature 101 global design masters, 1000+ full-time designers, 500+ professional procurement and sales personnel, 5200+ directly managed workers, a super supply chain covering 14 countries worldwide, and 26 Jingdong MALLs opening for entry. Entering through a self-operated model, it claims to redefine new standards for home decoration. 据介绍，「京东家装」将拥有全球 101 个设计大师，1000+ 专职设计师，500+ 专业采销，5200+ 直管工人，超级供应链覆盖全球 14 国，26 家京东 MALL 开启入驻，通过自营模式入场，号称重新定义家装新标准。

The official statement indicates that Jingdong Home Decoration will leverage JoyAI smart infrastructure and super supply chain capabilities to reshape the user's home decoration experience; with smarter and easier-to-use AI intelligent products, and more transparent and efficient smart services, allowing consumers to choose with confidence, peace of mind, and ease. 官方表示，京东家装将以 JoyAI 智慧基建及超级供应链能力，重塑用户家装体验；以更聪明易用的 AI 智能产品，更透明高效的智慧服务，让消费者闭眼选、放心选、省心选。

item.title: 山姆有机冻干草莓厂家被曝农残重金属超标
item.guid: 山姆有机冻干草莓厂家被曝农残重金属超标
item.description:
Botherless Organic Freeze-Dried Strawberries

According to "Yuan News" reports, several netizens recently revealed that the OEM factory for Sam's Club's "Botherless Organic Freeze-Dried Strawberries" is suspected to be the same one where freeze-dried strawberries were found to have excessive pesticide residues and heavy metals in media reports. 据「元新闻」报道，日前有多名网友爆料，山姆售卖的「Botherless 有机冻干草莓」代工厂和媒体报道内检测出来冻干草莓农残、重金属超标疑是同一家。

According to reports, the manufacturer of this product sold by Sam's Club is listed as Fujian Lixing Food Co., Ltd.; and in reports from media outlets such as Dafeng News and The Beijing News, the freeze-dried strawberries purchased by complainant Ms. Lin, which were found to have excessive pesticide residues and heavy metals, also came from Fujian Lixing Food Co., Ltd. 据报道，山姆售卖的此款商品中，生产商显示为福建立兴食品股份有限公司；而在大风新闻、新京报等媒体的报道中，投诉人林女士采购的农残、重金属超标的冻干草莓同样来自福建立兴食品股份有限公司。

Regarding this matter, Sam's Club's official customer service responded on the same day, stating, "I will forward the situation you reported to the relevant departments." Subsequent reports indicated that the product has since been delisted by Sam's Club. 针对此事，当日，山姆官方客服回应称，「目前您反馈的情况我将会反馈至相关部门。」随后报道称，目前山姆该产品已下架。

item.title: 胖东来回应鸡蛋角黄素超标
item.guid: 胖东来回应鸡蛋角黄素超标
item.description:
According to Elephant News, blogger "Wang Hai Evaluation" recently posted a video claiming that eggs from Pang Dong Lai supermarket tested positive for an artificial pigment called canthaxanthin (also known as capsanthin), and its content exceeded the maximum allowed addition of canthaxanthin in poultry feed as stipulated by the "Safety Use Specification for Feed Additives" issued by the Ministry of Agriculture and Rural Affairs. 据大象新闻报道，近期博主「王海测评」发视频称，胖东来超市的鸡蛋检测出一种名为角黄素（斑蝥黄）的人工色素，并且含量超出农业农村部发布的《饲料添加剂安全使用规范》蛋禽类饲料中斑蝥黄允许的最大添加量。

In response to the above situation, a Pang Dong Lai staff member stated, "All raw egg products sold in our store are legally purchased through regular channels, with complete procedures, and have undergone corresponding inspection processes upon arrival. We have not yet received any notice (of delisting)." 针对上述情况，胖东来工作人员表示，「我们卖场售卖的生蛋产品，均通过正规的途径合法采购，手续都是齐全的，也得到了相应的进货查验的过程，暂时没有接到（下架）的通知。」

Pang Dong Lai responded in a statement, indicating that the relevant investigations by market regulatory authorities and third-party re-inspections have not yet yielded results. If the final investigation results show that the fresh eggs have problems, they will immediately disclose the results and initiate a delisting and recall procedure, bearing corresponding legal responsibilities according to law. 胖东来方面发文回应表示，目前市场监管部门的相关调查以及第三方复检还未出结果，如果最终的调查结果显示鲜鸡蛋存在问题，会第一时间公示结果，并立即启动下架召回程序，依法承担相应法律责任。

It also emphasized that if there are no issues, Pang Dong Lai will resolutely pursue legal action to protect its rights and hold individuals, self-media, and platforms accountable for their legal responsibilities in this incident. 其同时也强调，如果没有问题，胖东来也将坚决依法诉讼维权，追究此次事件中个人、自媒体、平台的法律责任。

Pang Dong Lai believes that canthaxanthin is a natural or synthetic carotenoid that can be used as a feed additive, and currently, there are no national regulations or requirements regarding the limit of canthaxanthin in fresh egg products. 胖东来认为，角黄素属于天然或合成的类胡萝卜素，可作为饲料添加剂使用，目前国家没有关于鲜鸡蛋产品角黄素限值的相关规定和要求。

item.title: 《夜访吸血鬼》第三季定档
item.guid: 《夜访吸血鬼》第三季定档
item.description:
According to Hollywood Watch, the opening credits for "Interview with the Vampire" Season 3, "The Vampire Lestat," have been released, and it has been announced that it will premiere on June 7th this year. 据守望好莱坞消息，《夜访吸血鬼》第三季《吸血鬼莱斯特》发布正片片头，并宣布将于今年 6 月 7 日开播。

The film tells the story of protagonist Lestat, who, dissatisfied with his portrayal in books, decides to retell his own story by forming a rock band and embarking on a tour. 该片讲述主角莱斯特因不满其在书籍中的形象，决定以组建摇滚乐队并开启巡演的方式，重新讲述自己的故事。

The film is produced by AMC, directed by Craig Zisk, written by Rolin Jones and Hannah Moscovitch, and stars Sam Reid, Jacob Anderson, and others. 影片由 AMC 出品，克雷格·齐斯克执导，罗林·琼斯、汉娜·莫斯科维奇编剧，萨姆·里德、雅各布·安德森等主演。

item.title: 《夜魔侠：重生》第二季发布新电视预告
item.guid: 《夜魔侠：重生》第二季发布新电视预告
item.description:
According to Hollywood Watch, Marvel series "Daredevil: Born Again" Season 2 has released a new TV trailer and will air on Disney+ on the 24th of this month. 据守望好莱坞报道，漫威剧集《夜魔侠：重生》第二季发布新电视预告，将于本月 24 日 Disney+ 播出。

Developed by Marvel Studios, the series tells the story of blind lawyer Matt Murdock, who, as Daredevil, confronts former gang leader Wilson Fisk, who seeks to enter politics, continuing their fated rivalry. 该剧由漫威影业开发，讲述盲人律师马特·默多克以夜魔侠身份对抗企图涉足政坛的前黑帮头目威尔逊·菲斯克，延续两人宿命对决。

The film's showrunner is Dario Scardapane, with Michael Cuesta, Justin Benson, Aaron Moorhead, and others co-directing, and stars Charlie Cox, Vincent D'Onofrio, Margarita Levieva, and others. 影片由达里奥·斯卡达潘担任剧集主管，迈克尔·科斯塔、贾斯汀·本森、艾伦·穆尔黑德等联合执导，查理·考克斯、文森特·多诺费奥、玛格丽塔·莱维瓦等主演。

早报
